hero.description: Frontend Developer specialized in React and 3D experiences

about.title: About Me
about.description: Frontend Developer with experience in modern web applications using React, Next.js, and scalable architectures. I have worked on real-time systems for drone management and complex dashboards.

description: Build and customized e-commerce platforms using WordPress and WooCommerce, including product managemenr, payment integration and responsive UI design. Managed deployment and hosting using Hostinger.

Developed a personal portfolio and content management system using React, TypeScript, TailwindCSS and Three.js, enabling dynamic project updates and modular content handling. Deployed using GitHub Pages.
Developed and maintained web apps using React and Next.js. Implemented gloal state management solutions useing React COntext and Redux Toolkit.
Worked on real-time frone and location management systems featuring maps, multimedia content, and reporting tools.Created dashboards and configurations views for mission-critical systems.
Collaborated with backend, design and product teams in agile environments.
Designed and developed responsive web and mobile apps using Angular and Flutter. Integrated frontend interfaces with backend services and cloud platforms.
Built cross-platform interfaces optimized for performance and usability. Managed deployment and hosting using Github Pages and HostGatos.

items.name: Drone Dashboard
items.description: Real-time dashboard for drone monitoring and management with data visualization and interactive maps.

items.name: 3D Portfolio Experience
items.description: Interactive portfolio with 3D models and custom shaders using React Three Fiber.

items.name: E-commerce Platform
items.description: Full web application with shopping cart, authentication, and product management.
